reviews.review_description:
Uodate: played all 27 levels, spent more hours playing this than I care to admit, reported some minor issues on their discord, but man this is fun as hell

You aim by looking (center of your face) and hold and release to shoot a charged shot. The trajectory shows you the shot, but it requires looking in the right place and holding for the right length of time. Simple to grasp, challenging to master, and works really well! At this price if that's all it was I'd be happy, but they're built a whole game with multiple levels, moving baskets, multiple baskets, its basically a pocket sized version of just hoops. I'll keep playing and exploring this product but my first impressions is very positive and it captures that feeling of those basket ball launcher toys I had when I was a kid except the little basketballs don't roll under the couch. A fun new toy to play when I'm feeling lazy and don't want to shoot zombies and just wanna chill on the couch

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for this thoughtful review! 🏀

You understood what we wanted to create: simple to pick up, but satisfying to master, with that little arcade/toy feeling you can enjoy from the couch.

Really happy the aiming, charged shot, and pocket-sized Just Hoops vibe are landing well. And yeah, no tiny balls under the couch is definitely a feature 🤣

Thanks for the support, it helps us a lot!

reviews.review_description:
I wasn’t expecting to like this game very much. The game feels & looks WAY better than the trailer from inside the headset. Using your eyes to control the basketball is incredibly well executed.  The controls are beyond simple and easy to learn but will take a long time to master. LOVE these type of games. 
Perfect game to play in 30-40 min intervals. There’s tons of levels & different modes of play. 

One thing id love to see added is rewards for certain achievements or lvls passed. Like basketball skins or hoop skins… somethin to give you a reason to play. Maybe there are collectibles but I simply haven’t earned any yet?  

I do have 1 minor complaint: Gold medals are INCREDIBLY tough to earn… in fact, some of the lvls seem downright impossible. There’s a lot of lvls where NOBODY has earned a gold.  Again, minor complaint.  

For $8 this game is a no brainer. Well worth the money. I was honestly expecting to return it before I played but ended up falling in love with it.  Keep up the great work! Can’t wait to see what’s added in the future

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks so much for the great feedback here and on UploadVR, we really appreciate it! It really helps our little Nano get known. 🏀

We’re very happy you enjoyed the controls and the feeling inside the headset. Rewards, skins and more reasons to keep playing are definitely things we’re looking at for future updates.

About the gold medals: yes, they’re meant to be tough, but we’ll keep an eye on the balance, especially for some levels that may need tuning based on player achievements.

Thanks for the support, it means a lot to us!

reviews.review_description: This is simple, addictive, and surprisingly satisfying. Whether you're sinking long-range shots, bouncing off an angle or trying to beat your own high score, it's one of those games that's hard to put down. Great physics, smooth controls, and perfect for a quick VR session with some great tracks to listen to. I cannot tell you just how much I am enjoying the gem of a game...

developer_response.body:
Wow, thank you! 🏀
Thanks for giving our little Nano so much love. Reviews like this really help the game find its crowd!

reviews.review_description:
Just Hoops Nano is like the little cute brother of Just Hoops.
Just hoops has you playing in first person, using your hands, little cute nano is like a 2D version and surprisingly plays really well, too much power sends your ball smack into your tv.
It’s a great fun game to pick up when you want to chill out and score some baskets.
Score enough points to open up another challenge.
Controls are very responsive and hand tracking is available, if you’re looking for some casual arcade fun, do not hesitate and at such a great price too.
RECOMMENDED FUN FOR ALL THE FAMILY.

developer_response.body:
Love this, the little brother may be small, but he’s definitely got game! 🏀😄
We’re really happy Nano gives you that easy “pick up and play” arcade feeling. 
Thanks a lot for the recommendation and for supporting the Just Hoops family!

reviews.review_description: Great! One of the best mixed reality games 👌😉❤️

developer_response.body:
Thank you Miky! 🏀❤️
So happy to hear that, being called one of the best mixed reality games is a huge compliment for our small team.
Thanks for playing and supporting us!

reviews.review_description: Great fun! Hoping for a Quest Achievements Update as I could see myself playing this one for hours on end.

developer_response.body: Yes, achievements are something we’re looking into for future updates. Thanks a lot for sharing your videos and for the support, it means a lot! 🏀

reviews.review_description: Super fun just one more shot!

developer_response.body:
Let’s goooo! 🏀
So happy you’re enjoying it, thanks a lot for playing and supporting our little Nano!

reviews.review_description: Honestly, before starting the game I wasn't sure if the idea was going to work. But it's really a hook. A lot of different levels. I wish there were more. Also, I just wished the response were a little faster with the power charging shot. For 8 bucks it's a no brainer. Easy grab guys. Have fun 👍 😀🎊

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! We’re really happy to see such positive reviews, they help our little Nano stand out from the crowd.

We’re glad the game hooked you, and we hear you. We’ll keep improving the experience, and there’s more to come.

Thanks for the support, and stay tuned! 🏀

reviews.review_title: A fun nano-sized mixed reality game
reviews.review_description: To be upfront, I wanted to mention that I received this game for free.  That said, this is a well polished mixed reality experience that is great for armchair play (or perhaps even on an airplane where you don't want to  swing your arms around).  It's a fun & addictive arcade style game.  I will definitely be playing this one more & will recommend it, especially for it's very reasonable price.  Well done developers, and please keep the updates & new games coming!

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your comment!

We’re really happy that you’re enjoying the game. We put a lot of care into making sure it works well while seated, so we’re glad you noticed that.

Feedback like yours is very important for us, because it shows that the game appeals to a wider audience, not only players who received it for free. We’re working hard to help Just Hoops Nano get the visibility it deserves.

Thanks for your support!
Thanks for the review and for playing! 🏀
